title: Explore Our Apartments
subtitle: Luxury, Comfort and Serenity in Tangier

rooms.title: Signature Luxury Suite
rooms.description: Experience the exceptional in Tangier in our 150 m² Signature Suite at La Teral. This prestige apartment combines elegance and natural light to offer a refined atmosphere with a breathtaking view of the sea and mountains. Ideal for families, it features three complete, spacious, and soundproofed bedrooms, one of which offers an elegant and friendly space for your relaxation moments or breakfasts. Share warm moments in our two large modern living rooms or prepare your meals like at home in a state-of-the-art, ultra-equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace. The real luxury? Its two private balconies offering a permanent spectacle over the Mediterranean, the city, and the majestic peaks.

rooms.title: Comfort & Serenity
rooms.description: Discover absolute comfort in this modern 65 m² apartment at L'appart Hôtel LA TERAL. Ideal for families or business trips, this air-conditioned accommodation features two comfortable bedrooms with Smart TV and soundproofed windows for total rest. Relax in a bright living room and enjoy a fully equipped kitchen to prepare your meals freely. An elegant bathroom, free Wi-Fi, and secure parking complete this cocoon, designed to offer you a perfect and hassle-free stay.
features: Bright living room with Smart TV
Fully equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

rooms.title: The Perfect Balance between Modernity and Serenity
rooms.description: Enjoy a large 73 m² apartment, ideally located in the center of Tangier. This modern design accommodation welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms, equipped with Smart TV and very comfortable beds (hypoallergenic bedding). One of the bedrooms opens onto a private balcony with a superb view of the city and mountains. The living room is spacious and bright. With its comfortable sofas, elegant carpet, and large Smart TV, it's the perfect place to relax. The kitchen is modern, fully equipped, and opens onto a sunny terrace. For your well-being, the apartment has central air conditioning and soundproofed windows (double glazing) to guarantee your peace and quiet.
features: 2 bedrooms (1 double bed with private balcony, 2 single beds)
Bright living room with Smart TV
Fully equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

rooms.title: The Alliance of Comfort & Warmth
rooms.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 m² apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, each equipped with its own Smart TV, hypoallergenic bedding, and soundproofed windows to guarantee you totally calm nights. Relax in a light-filled living room, also equipped with a large Smart TV, or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view. Its contemporary bathroom completes this comfort cocoon ideal for your stays in Tangier.
features: 2 bedrooms (1 double bed with wardrobe, safe, TV; 2 single beds with Smart TV)
Bright living room with Smart TV
Equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

rooms.title: Cozy and Bright
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and soothing setting, ideally located in the heart of Tangier. Apartment N°5 welcomes you with two comfortable bedrooms designed for your rest, as well as a bright living room equipped with plush sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its fully equipped kitchen and contemporary bathroom with shower offer you all the comfort needed for a 'home away from home' stay.
features: 2 bedrooms (1 double bed with Smart TV, safe, wardrobe; 2 single beds with Smart TV)
Bright living room with Smart TV
Fully equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle)
Kitchen utensils provided (glasses, plates, cutlery, pots, cups, pans)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

rooms.title: Elegance & Breathtaking View
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious 73 m² apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms and a bright living room, equipped with very comfortable sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers you a breathtaking view. Designed for your family vacations or business trips, this haven of peace includes everything you need for a worry-free stay.
features: 2 bedrooms (1 double bed with wardrobe, integrated safe, private balcony with view; 2 single beds)
Bright living room with Smart TV
Equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, coffee machine, kettle)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

rooms.title: Luxury and Serenity
rooms.description: Treat yourself to an exceptional stay at Appart-Hôtel LA TERAL, in the heart of Tangier. This chic 73 m² apartment combines luxury and serenity to accommodate families, business travelers, and groups of friends in absolute comfort. Enjoy two elegantly designed bedrooms, air-conditioned, perfectly soundproofed, and each equipped with its own Smart TV. Relax in a modern and warm living room or prepare your meals in a fully equipped kitchen. A real charm asset, it opens onto a private balcony offering a soothing view of the mountains and the city. A contemporary bathroom and quality services complete this ideal cocoon for your stay.
features: 2 bedrooms (1 double bed with wardrobe, safe; 2 single beds)
Bright living room with Smart TV
Equipped kitchen (hob, extractor hood, microwave, fridge, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle)
Modern bathroom (shower, towels, hairdryer, soap, shower gel, shampoo)

included_features: All our apartments include: Central Air Conditioning, Soundproofed Windows, High-Speed Free Wi-Fi, FREE Secure Parking, free cleaning service throughout your stay, and continuous hot/cold water.
